seo.home.title: Flight Baggage Rules — Check Baggage Weight Limits & Allowances for Every Airline
seo.home.description: Check flight baggage rules for every airline. Compare international flight baggage weight limits, domestic flight baggage rules, carry-on sizes, and checked baggage allowances for Delta, United, American, Lufthansa & more.
seo.airlines.title: Airline Flight Baggage Rules Directory — All Airlines Baggage Policies
seo.airlines.description: Browse flight baggage rules for 50+ airlines. Check Delta flight baggage rules, United flight baggage policies, Lufthansa international flight baggage allowance, carry-on limits, and checked baggage fees.
seo.items.title: Travel Item Rules — What Can You Bring on a Flight?
seo.items.description: Check if your item is allowed in carry-on or checked flight baggage. TSA rules, IATA guidelines, and airline-specific restrictions for 100+ items on domestic and international flights.

seo.compare.description: Compare carry-on sizes, checked baggage fees, and battery rules across multiple airlines side by side.
